metadata.title: Hla Shindeah — Portfolio
metadata.description: Hla Shindeah — Senior UI/UX Designer & Front-End Developer. Crafting digital experiences, from idea to code.

hero.name: Hla Shindeah
hero.title: Senior UI/UX Designer & Front-End Developer
hero.description: Seven years turning ideas into digital products people love — through design, code, and motion. From idea to code.

about.heading: Passionate About Crafting Digital Experiences
about.paragraph1: I'm a creative developer and designer with a passion for building beautiful, functional digital experiences that make a real impact.
about.paragraph2: With expertise spanning web development, UI/UX design, video production, and graphic design, I bring a holistic approach to every project.

services.heading: Services I Offer
services.description: From concept to completion, I deliver end-to-end creative solutions tailored to your needs.

websites.title: Web Development
websites.desc: Modern, responsive websites built with Next.js, React, and cutting-edge technologies.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.desc: User-centered interfaces that balance beauty with usability and accessibility.

branding.title: Graphic Design
branding.desc: Visual identities, logos, social media assets, and print materials that stand out.

video.title: Video Production
video.desc: Cinematic video content from concept through post-production and motion graphics.

ctaBanner.heading: Let's Work Together
ctaBanner.subheading: Have a project in mind? Let's create something extraordinary together.

about.title: About Me
about.heading: About Me
about.subtitle: My Story
about.description: A creative developer and designer passionate about crafting digital experiences that merge aesthetics with functionality.

e1.desc: Redesigned ERP systems and mobile applications with a user-first approach using Figma; built responsive interfaces with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Three.js, collaborating directly with the Customer Service Manager to translate client needs into functional, intuitive UI.

e2.company: BW for Digital Marketing & Software Solutions — KSA (Remote)
e2.desc: Leading a team of designers and developers, streamlining creative workflows, and delivering web and mobile interfaces that increased usability and consistency.

e3.desc: Designed web and mobile UI using Next.js and MUI, and contributed to strategic decisions for a platform that reached 94,000+ users and 50,000+ downloads, working with 3,000+ publishers.

e4.desc: Produced media content and facilitated workshops reaching 700+ users.

e5.desc: Conducted technical training that increased staff efficiency by 25%.

e6.company: Believe in Syria Campaign — JCI Syria
e6.desc: Directed social media and campaign visuals; led print and digital media production for large-scale outreach.

e7.desc: Developed product packaging and visual content for digital campaigns, helping boost online visibility and brand presence.

e8.desc: Created full web designs using Adobe XD, HTML, CSS, and Bootstrap; developed engaging front-end experiences for both mobile and web.
